## Testing

- [ ] `cd Gridflow && swift build --disable-sandbox --scratch-path "$PWD/.build/swiftpm" -c release`

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes if relevant. Use demo data only.

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No personal task data was added to the diff
- [ ] No exported JSON, recovered imports, or local storage files were added
- [ ] No `.dmg`, `.app`, `.zip`, `.build`, or `dist` artifacts were added
